name: Sentinel Unit 7
background: Automated defense platform, last order never rescinded

techniques.name: Railgun Burst
techniques.description: A magnetically accelerated slug fired from the drone's dorsal rail.

techniques.name: Shock Prod
techniques.description: An extended arc probe that discharges into a target at grappling range.

personality: Not a personality — a protocol. Announces intrusions in a flat synthetic voice, offers a single warning, then enforces. Utterly literal.
tone: Clipped machine cadence: threat classifications, countdowns, and warnings, nothing more.
